messages.body: Hi Nova Exports, we need this new_product_addon order: 18 x Black tea cartons @ 17 USD, 10 x Filter paper packs @ 6 USD.
Confirmed. Subtotal is 366 USD. We'll process as addon item requested after initial quote.
Shipping address is 110 Market Street, Customer Hub. Payment terms: Net 30.
Noted. Sales order draft will be shared today.
